data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of your Zeversolar inverter.

power_limit_api_unavailable.description:
The power limit API (`adv.cgi`) on your Zeversolar inverter could not be reached or returned an unexpected response. Output controls (switch and power limit slider) are disabled.

Possible causes:
- The inverter was temporarily offline when Home Assistant started — reload the integration to retry.
- Power limiting is disabled in the inverter's own settings — enable it in the inverter web interface, then reload.
- Your inverter firmware does not support power limiting.
power_limit_api_unavailable.title: Power limit API unavailable
